title: Third Person Bow
description: A smol mod that makes you switch to third-person while drawing a bow.
body:
My first ever minecraft mod that does 1 thingy~

Switch to third-person while drawing a bow.
Becuase when using [First-person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) or [Real Camera](https://modrinth.com/mod/real-camera) with [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) and [Too Many Bows](https://modrinth.com/mod/too-many-bows), drawing a bow the first person model will block the whole view, so I made this mod to avoid using bow in first person.

I know I can disable first person model render when holding an item but I also like how it looks when my character is holding a bow :P

Best use with [Shoulder Surfing Reloaded](https://modrinth.com/mod/shoulder-surfing-reloaded).

![Demo](https://image.meowbot.moe/uploads/original/21/77/4223af46d2f08bd8303ae2b71e8e.gif)
